title: Bounties
body:
**⭐ Bounties | DonutSMP Bounty**
Replica of DonutSMP Bounty plugin.

**Overview**

**Bounties** lets players put rewards on each other. When a player with a bounty is defeated, the reward goes to whoever takes them down. Simple, fun, and adds a competitive edge to your world.

⚡ **Features**

**≻ Smooth and intuitive bounty GUI**

**≻ Add or view bounties on any player**

**≻ Confirmation menu to prevent mistakes**

**≻ Cooldowns to prevent bounty spam**

**≻ Fully customizable messages**


**Commands & Permissions**

**/bounty** — opens the bounty menu

**/bounty add** — add a bounty

**/bounty search** — search for a player's bounties

**/bounty reload** — reload the plugin

**/bounty clear** — clear a player's bounty


**Permissions**:

**bounties.add** — allows adding bounties

**bounties.reload** — allows reloading the plugin

**bounties.clear** — allows clearing bounties

**bounties.admin** — grants full admin access

**bounties.*** — gives every permission in the plugin


️ **Installation**

Place the Bounties.jar in your plugins folder

Restart your server

Edit the config if you want to customize anything

**Visual Representation**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69e9b9c56c2770fc7709d792da9bf59d5945f3d0.gif)

**Dependencies**
- **Vault**: Get it here: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/
- **EssentialsX**: Get it here: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/essentialsx.9089/

**Support Server**: https://discord.gg/XSp8z5xVPy

**Please report bugs in the support server.**

**I wasn't able to add the Search Sign GUI as it turned out to be more challenging than I anticipated. If you're able to assist with that, feel free to DM me on Discord at @yoferox.**
